entry.title: New: RES26-133 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, LODGING AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $4,060.98, TO THE CITY FROM THE TRUST FOR PUBLIC LAND (TPL) FOR A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE OFFICE OF THE MANAGING DIRECTOR TO ATTEND TPL'S NATIONAL DAY ON THE HILL IN WASHINGTON, D.C., FROM APRIL 13-15, 2026.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
